summary: Build a web page (swap screen) that lets a user connect a wallet (including options like MetaMask) and swap USDC to a gold token.
architectural_notes: Support multiple wallet connection/auth providers (e.g., Internet Identity plus EVM wallets like MetaMask) in the swap UI.

existing_features.title: Create a Swap page UI that allows a user to connect their wallet (Internet Identity) and perform a USDC → GOLD swap in a single screen.

Integrate the Swap page with the backend via the generated actor, using the existing Internet Identity hooks (without modifying immutable hook files), and display real-time balances, quote, and swap history.

Apply a cohesive visual theme and layout for the swap screen (distinct style, consistent typography/colors/components) without using a blue+purple palette, and ensure the UI looks good on mobile and desktop.
Add generated static image assets for token icons and a subtle background illustration, and render them in the UI from frontend/public/assets/generated (do not serve images from the backend).

Update the Swap screen wallet connection controls to present multiple wallet/login options (including an explicit MetaMask option) while keeping Internet Identity as the only functional authentication method, and clearly indicating in the UI that MetaMask is not currently supported.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a swap screen web page to connect a wallet and swap USDC to a gold token

Implement backend canister logic to support a simple swap flow keyed by the caller Principal: store per-user balances for "USDC" and "GOLD", return balances, provide a quote for USDC→GOLD using a fixed configurable rate, and execute swaps with validation.
Upgrade wallet connection to include additional login options such as MetaMask

projectName: Swap screen to connect wallet and swap USDC to Gold token
